package rulecoverage

func PositiveBunNewdbPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "bun_newdb_per_request"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Bun DB handles created directly on request paths instead of reused process-level state."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
